languages.text: "Я — верн{mf|ый|ая} слуга из рода Гапраков, Ваша Светлость, и приш{mf|ел|ла} вам на помощь".

traits.locale_text: "Я — верный слуга из рода Гапраков, Ваша Светлость".

languages.text: "I am a loyal servant of House Gaprak, Your Lordship, and have come to your aid."
languages.original_text: "Я — верн{mf|ый|ая} слуга из рода Гапраков, Ваша Светлость, и приш{mf|ел|ла} вам на помощь".

traits.locale_text: "I am a loyal servant of House Gaprak, Your Lordship, and have come to your aid."
"I am a loyal servant of House Gaprak, Your Lordship, and have come to your aid."
"I am a loyal servant of House Gaprak, Your Lordship, and have come to your aid."

languages.text: “舰长大人，我是贾帕克家族的忠仆，特来相助。”
languages.original_text: "I am a loyal servant of House Gaprak, Your Lordship, and have come to your aid."

traits.locale_text: “舰长大人，我是贾帕克家族的忠仆，特来相助。”

languages.text: « Je suis {mf|un fidèle serviteur|une fidèle servante} de la maison Gaprak, Votre Seigneurie, et je suis ici pour vous aider. »
languages.original_text: "I am a loyal servant of House Gaprak, Your Lordship, and have come to your aid."

traits.locale_text: « Je suis {mf|un fidèle serviteur|une fidèle servante} de la maison Gaprak, Votre Seigneurie, et je suis ici pour vous aider. »

languages.text: "Ben Gaprak Hanesi'nin sadık bir hizmetkârıyım Lord Hazretleri. Sana yardım etmeye geldim."
languages.original_text: "I am a loyal servant of House Gaprak, Your Lordship, and have come to your aid."

traits.locale_text: "Ben Gaprak Hanesi'nin sadık bir hizmetkârıyım Lord Hazretleri. Sana yardım etmeye geldim."

languages.text: «Soy un{mf||a} fiel sirviente de la casa Gaprak, mi señor, y vengo a ayudarle».
languages.original_text: "I am a loyal servant of House Gaprak, Your Lordship, and have come to your aid."

traits.locale_text: «Soy un{mf||a} fiel sirviente de la casa Gaprak, mi señor, y vengo a ayudarle».

languages.text: "Ich komme als {mf|treuer Diener|treue Dienerin} von Haus Gaprak, um Euch zu unterstützen, Eure Lordschaft."
languages.original_text: "I am a loyal servant of House Gaprak, Your Lordship, and have come to your aid."

traits.locale_text: "Ich komme als {mf|treuer Diener|treue Dienerin} von Haus Gaprak, um Euch zu unterstützen, Eure Lordschaft."

languages.text: 「私はギャプラク家の忠実な家臣で、貴殿の助けに参りました」
languages.original_text: "I am a loyal servant of House Gaprak, Your Lordship, and have come to your aid."

traits.locale_text: 「私はギャプラク家の忠実な家臣で、貴殿の助けに参りました」
